title: changed_files 자동 수집 (record-result union)
source_request: 다음 후보 #1은 changed_files 자동 수집(complete가 work-item.changed_files를 읽는데 수동 dogfood선 비어 핀이 필요 — implementer 노드가 갱신하게 하거나 --changed-files 추가).
goal: record-result unions an owner-reported changed_files into the work item so `autopilot complete` reads it without a manual pin

acceptance_criteria.statement: record-result with a changed_files payload on a contentful pass updates the work item changed_files to contain the union of prior and reported paths, deduplicated.
autopilot complete then produces a completion contract whose changed_files equals the work item changed_files, with no manual pin.
A record-result with outcome fail leaves the work item changed_files equal to its prior value.
